1.21.11.description: Engineered for maximum optimization on the stable 1.21.11 lifecycle. Features updated Sodium memory limits, fast network socket profiling, and smooth frame times.

1.21.description: Optimized for the latest game features. Includes full Distant Horizons chunk caching and the complete modern rendering engine framework.

1.20.4.description: The baseline for long-term server infrastructure. Excellent performance tuning with highly stable engine hooks and minimal overhead.

1.19.2.description: The classic optimization profile. Tailored for maximum retro-hardware compatibility and legacy runtime stability.
